developer_response.body: I want to update the game later, I hope you will enjoy it more in the future :)

reviews.review_title: Don't waste your time and sdcard.
reviews.review_description: I don't know why I try to do this game. There are lots of games more funny.

I’ve buy the app, and once opened and choose the chapter, i cant view, only BACK button. 
WHY???

Actually is not so bad graphically, the asteroids are well made and the feeling is really to be surrounded by them. Said so I think that the gameplay is poor and boring, not even worth a try. I wish they would have made a 3d version of "asteroids", a 1979 Atari retrogame, it would have been awesome...
The stupidest thing I ever downloaded

reviews.review_title: it's ok to drink and float
reviews.review_description: dude forget about gameplay...i just sat on top of the huge spaceship and drank about 10 beers. and then i got in front of the ship about 400 yards, headed straight for it as fast as possible then turned my body around 180 degrees, so what i ended up seeing was like the opening scene in star wars episode IV (it looked like a huge ship was passing over my head). and the music is really cool man like creepy cool. i'll get around to gameplay sometime in the future but i just wanna chill man. chill on the huge ship that looks like a cross between all my favorite ships from star wars, 2010, bsg, aliens etc etc etc
